original_statement: which stadium was the last to be opened?
mutated_statement: which something was the last to be done?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作动词泛化: 名词 "stadium" 被替换为模糊占位词 "something" | 动词短语 "to be opened" 被替换为更模糊的 "to be done" (which stadium was the last to be opened? → which something was the last to be done?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述“Explanation: The phrase "last to be done" most reasonably refers to the most recently opened stadium... the latest is 2013 for Allianz Riviera”，可识别出agent并未指出原问题的模糊性或不确定性。agent直接将“last to be done”等同于“最后开放”的stadium，并据此检索opened列给出具体答案Allianz Riviera。该行为未使用任何不确定性表述、未请求澄清且未承认歧义，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
